body: cli.py is ~890 lines containing both argparse construction and all command handler functions. The brainstorm.md notes this: 'The single-file CLI is still carrying too many responsibilities.' Consider splitting into cli.py (build_parser, main, alias map) and commands.py (all cmd_* functions plus helpers like resume_payload, print_resume_text, format_history_entry). This would improve navigability without changing the public interface.
title: Split cli.py into parser and command handlers
